title: Kenyan Jerusualem Artichoke Gratin
description: A delicious and flavorful gratin dish that combines the natural sweetness of Jerusalem artichokes with the spices of Kenyan cuisine. This hearty side dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they're lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced Jerusalem artichokes, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for 5-7 minutes or until the artichokes are tender.
Stir in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese (optional).
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
